name: jarvis-onshape-mcp
description: Jarvis Onshape MCP — let Claude drive real Onshape CAD. Sketches, extrudes, fillets, mates, parametric iteration, FeatureScript custom features. Includes the vision-decomposition skill (zoom-and-describe a reference image into a structured feature tree before building) and side-by-side reference comparison tool. Structured truth-telling on every mutation.
